hero.title: Equipment Catalog for Institutional Procurement
hero.description: PEIC-manufactured sterilization systems and supported partner technologies organized for hospital, project, biomedical, and tender evaluation.

manufacturing.title: PEIC Indigenous Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Our core manufacturing program adheres to stringent regulatory and quality standards.
manufacturing.advantages_subtitle: We are the OEM — not a reseller. Every advantage flows from deep engineering DNA.

advantages.title: In-House Engineering
advantages.description: Design, test, and iterate in our Vadodara facility — not outsourced.

advantages.title: BIS-Certified Since 1976
advantages.description: Longest-running IS 3829 certification in the sterilization category.

advantages.title: Local Spare Parts
advantages.description: Localized spare parts inventory — no import delays for critical components.

advantages.title: Tender Support
advantages.description: MSME/NSIC documentation support where applicable, with final eligibility reviewed tender by tender.

partners.title: Global & Domestic Partner Technologies
partners.description: Authorized technical integration partner for the world's leading medical technology brands.
partners.advantages_subtitle: Integration, service, and procurement support through one accountable technical partner.

advantages.title: Technical Integration
advantages.description: Installation, calibration, and training support instead of equipment-only delivery.

advantages.title: Unified Service
advantages.description: One service relationship for PEIC-manufactured and supported partner equipment.

advantages.title: Local Coordination
advantages.description: Local coordination for technical queries, service requests, and parts requirements.

advantages.title: Single-Point Procurement
advantages.description: A single point of contact for multi-brand institutional procurement.

manufactured_products.name: Horizontal Cylindrical / Rectangular High-Pressure Steam Sterilizers
manufactured_products.description: Industrial-grade autoclaves for CSSD departments, designed for high-volume sterilization cycles with precision temperature and pressure control.

manufactured_products.name: High-Speed 'Flash' Steam Sterilizers
manufactured_products.description: Specialized units for rapid sterilization of surgical instruments between procedures, minimizing OT downtime and ensuring instrument readiness.

manufactured_products.name: Vertical Autoclaves
manufactured_products.description: Space-efficient vertical sterilizers ideal for laboratories, clinics, and smaller CSSD units with full regulatory compliance.

manufactured_products.name: Bedpan / Bowl & Utensil Sterilizers
manufactured_products.description: Dedicated sterilization systems for patient-care utensils, supporting infection control in ward and ICU environments.

manufactured_products.name: Hot & Cold-Water Pressure Sterilizers
manufactured_products.description: Pressure sterilization systems using hot and cold-water cycles for specialized medical and laboratory applications.

manufactured_products.name: Bio Medical Waste Sanitizers
manufactured_products.description: Biomedical-waste treatment systems for safe sanitization in accordance with applicable healthcare waste-management requirements.

manufactured_products.name: Tabletop Sterilization Units
manufactured_products.description: Compact bench-top autoclaves for dental clinics, small operating theatres, and outpatient surgical centres.

manufactured_products.name: CSSD Furniture & Equipment Trolleys
manufactured_products.description: Stainless-steel CSSD workstations, instrument trolleys, and storage solutions designed for sterile-processing workflows.

partner_companies.name: AngioDynamics
partner_companies.description: Oncology systems for RFA and microwave ablation, including NanoKnife IRE.

partner_companies.name: Steris Corporation
partner_companies.description: Integrated OT lighting, surgical tables, and CSSD infrastructure.

partner_companies.name: Dentsply Sirona
partner_companies.description: Comprehensive dental suites and CBCT imaging.

partner_companies.name: Samsung Electronics
partner_companies.description: Diagnostic imaging, endoscopic ultrasound, and portable DR.

partner_companies.name: Designs for Vision
partner_companies.description: LED headlights and autofluorescence wound imaging.

partner_companies.name: Neuro Equilibrium Diagnostics
partner_companies.description: VNG, vHIT, and VR vestibular rehabilitation.

partner_companies.name: Simtek Medico Systems
partner_companies.description: Syringe pumps, infusion pumps, and NST machines.

partner_companies.name: Bird Meditech
partner_companies.description: Radiant heat warmers and LED phototherapy units.

partner_companies.name: Alan Electronic Systems
partner_companies.description: High-frequency electrosurgical units and OT lights.

partner_companies.name: Palakkad Surgical Industries & Technomed
partner_companies.description: Electrically operated and electro-hydraulic operating tables.

cta.label: Product Support
cta.title: Shortlist equipment with procurement-ready context
cta.description: Tell us the department, quantity, city, and tender stage. PEIC will help route specifications, pricing, and technical guidance.
